branchPolicy: main is stable; all implementation commits must be made on codex/phaseXX-* feature branches.
mainPushPolicy: direct push to main is prohibited; push only codex/phaseXX-* branches.
prPolicy: merge to main only through PR review and merge flow.
postMergePolicy: after merge, update each PC manually with git pull origin main.

workStartChecks.label: Switch to stable main before starting work.
Update main from the private repository before implementation.
Confirm working tree clean before creating a feature branch.
Create a feature branch before editing or committing.

featureBranchSteps: confirm the current branch is not main

commitBeforeChecks.label: Run git branch and confirm the current branch is codex/phaseXX-*.
Run git status and confirm intended files only.
Do not commit directly on main.

pushBeforeChecks.label: Run git branch before push and confirm feature branch.
Review the last commits before push.

prBeforeChecks.label: Create PR from feature branch to main only after validation.
Do not mark Ready for review automatically.
main receives changes through PR merge, not direct local commit.

mainDirectCommitResponse.label: If main shows ahead, stop before pushing.
Create a feature branch from the current commit before any push.
Push the feature branch only; do not push main.
Use PR flow to integrate into main.

prohibitedActions.label: Do not commit directly to main.
Do not make GitHub Pages required.

operationPrinciples: main is always treated as the merged stable state.
All implementation work starts from updated main and moves to a feature branch before editing.
Push is limited to codex/phaseXX-* feature branches.
Private repository, local first, and no GitHub Pages dependency remain the operating premise.
nextRecommendedStep: Before any future implementation, run git switch main, git pull origin main, git status, then git switch -c codex/phaseXX-description and commit only on that feature branch.
